title: Iceburg Reveals the Blueprints
description: Chopper reports what Robin said, while the attack on Iceburg and Robin’s actions push the Straw Hats deeper into Water Seven’s conspiracy.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Iceburg, Paulie, Nico Robin, Blueno, Chopper. Chopper reports what Robin said, while the attack on Iceburg and Robin’s actions push the Straw Hats deeper into Water Seven’s conspiracy.

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: appar- entry, they haven't been caught yet.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Form a tight line!! Galley-La company!!

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: You're too loud! Be quiet, tileston!!

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: They didn't get on the sea trains.

summary: Chopper reports what Robin said, while the attack on Iceburg and Robin’s actions push the Straw Hats deeper into Water Seven’s conspiracy.
